word.title: JSON Schema for the Concept of Validation Tool Types
word.name: JSON Schema for the concept of validation tool types
word.description: This is the JSON Schema for elements of the concept of validation tool types. Every element of this concept must validate against this JSON schema.

validationToolType.name: validation tool type
validationToolType.title: Validation Tool Type
validationToolType.description: data about this validation tool type

slug.name: slug
slug.title: Slug
slug.description: The unique identifier for this validation tool type

name.name: name
name.title: Name
name.description: The display name of this validation tool type

description.name: description
description.title: Description
description.description: A description of this validation tool type

nodeTypeSlug.name: node type slug
nodeTypeSlug.title: Node Type Slug
nodeTypeSlug.description: The slug of the node type this validation tool applies to

validationFormat.name: validation format
validationFormat.title: Validation Format
validationFormat.description: The mechanism used for validation (e.g., json-schema-2020-12, external-script)
